VAL-DASHPROD-011.evidence: Product detail page at /dashboard/products/[id] showed info card with Name, GTIN, Serial Number, DID, Category, Description, and Status badge.

VAL-DASHPROD-012.evidence: Event timeline showed CREATED event with timestamp. After edit, UPDATED event appeared. After mint, MINTED event appeared.

VAL-DASHPROD-013.evidence: DRAFT product showed 'Mint' button visible. 'Download QR' button was not visible.

VAL-DASHPROD-014.evidence: Clicking 'Mint' on DRAFT product called POST /products/:id/mint. Page refreshed showing ACTIVE status, MINTED event in timeline, and passport data populated.

VAL-DASHPROD-015.evidence: ACTIVE product showed passport card with QR code image, Digital Link, txHash, tokenAddress. 'Download QR' button visible. 'Mint' button not visible.

VAL-DASHPROD-016.evidence: Clicking 'Download QR' on ACTIVE product triggered download action for PNG file from GET /products/:id/qr.

VAL-DASHPROD-017.evidence: DRAFT status badge had yellow color. ACTIVE status badge had emerald (#00FF88) color.

VAL-DASHPROD-018.evidence: Edit button on DRAFT product opened edit form. Changed name and description, saved. Updated values reflected on page and UPDATED event appeared in timeline.

frictions: GTIN 04000000000007 provided in test plan had incorrect check digit; used 04000000000006 instead
